market_summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 enters its first preview day. The market shows a focus on consolidation and quality, with a strong emphasis on the debut of the 'Echoes' sector and digital art integration via 'Zero 10'.
art_highlight: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 official preview day begins, showcasing 240 galleries and debuts of 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' sectors.
